blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,173 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 47.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 43" over the past week. Current depth: 59".
